context: 1968 was the inaugural year of the Oricon Singles Chart, which began tracking physical sales on January 4th. The chart reflected a vibrant mix of enka ballads, the Group Sounds rock movement inspired by the British Invasion, and early kayokyoku pop. Sen Masao's 'Hoshikage no Waltz' became the first-ever Oricon yearly #1, selling 1.58 million copies.

tracks.title: Kaette Kita Yopparai (The Drunken Man Returns)
